summary.business_type: Boutique real estate — individual seller/broker, two active villa listings near Green School Bali
top_findings: Zero content in the initial HTML on every page (fully client-rendered SPA, no SSR/prerender) — invisible to non-JS-executing crawlers including GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot
No robots.txt, sitemap.xml, or llms.txt exist despite being required by the project's own guidelines
Zero structured data anywhere (no Organization, WebSite, FAQPage, or Product/listing schema)
/lifestyle and /green-school are 100% duplicate content of homepage sections, and both have zero <h1>
Only 3 of 9 pages set a unique title/meta description, even client-side
quick_wins: Add FAQPage JSON-LD to /faq using the 9 Q&A pairs already written in FAQPage.tsx
Call the existing usePageMeta hook on the 6 pages that don't use it yet
Add robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt as static files in client/public/
Preload the two hero images and switch from CSS background-image to /
Make FAQ accordion answers exist in the DOM by default instead of only when clicked

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Clean, human-readable URL structure with no query-string routing
Semantic landmarks (nav, main, footer) present on every page
All 9 routes reachable within 1 click via the footer — no orphan pages

findings.title: No robots.txt
findings.description: GET /robots.txt returns the SPA fallback shell (200 text/html), not a real robots.txt. No client/public/robots.txt exists.
findings.recommendation: Add a robots.txt explicitly allowing GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and Google-Extended, per this project's own CLAUDE.md.

findings.title: No sitemap.xml
findings.description: GET /sitemap.xml returns the same SPA shell. No sitemap exists for any of the 9 indexable routes.
findings.recommendation: Generate and serve a sitemap.xml listing all indexable routes.

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: GET /llms.txt returns the SPA shell. Required by this project's own CLAUDE.md; entirely absent.
findings.recommendation: Add an llms.txt at the site root listing canonical URLs and short descriptions.

findings.title: Fully client-rendered, zero content in initial HTML
findings.description:
Every route's raw HTML is identical:
and a script tag. Confirmed identical across all 9 routes when fetched without JS execution.
findings.recommendation: Add server-side rendering or static prerendering so meaningful content and per-page metadata exist in the initial HTML response.

findings.title: No canonical tags
findings.description: No <link rel="canonical"> anywhere in the codebase.
findings.recommendation: Add a canonical tag to every page, self-referencing unless a duplicate/parameterized URL exists.

findings.title: No Open Graph / Twitter Card tags
findings.description: No og:title, og:description, og:image, or twitter:card meta tags anywhere. Social shares show no image and a generic preview.
findings.recommendation: Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags, with per-page image/description overrides.

findings.title: Only 3 of 9 pages set a unique title/description client-side
findings.description: usePageMeta is only called on Home.tsx, VillaSungai.tsx, and VillaKailash.tsx. The other 6 routes never update the title, including a page purpose-built as its own SEO landing page (/green-school-villa-bali).
findings.recommendation: Call usePageMeta with unique title/description on all remaining pages.

findings.title: No security headers
findings.description: No Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, or Referrer-Policy on any response.
findings.recommendation: Add helmet or equivalent Express middleware to set standard security headers.

findings.title: Legacy meta keywords tag present
findings.description: index.html still ships a <meta name="keywords"> tag, ignored by Google since ~2009.
findings.recommendation: Remove the tag; no functional benefit and it's dead weight.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: FAQ page content is genuinely strong: 9 questions in real buyer language, each answered in 2-3 declarative, entity-rich sentences
Villa Sungai and Villa Kailash have distinct, specific hero copy after the latest edit
Clean heading hierarchy within any single rendered page

findings.title: /lifestyle and /green-school are 100% duplicate content of homepage sections
findings.description: Both pages render only a single shared component (<GreenSchool /> or <Lifestyle />) that is verbatim identical to the section already embedded in the homepage. Both also have zero <h1> and share the generic homepage title/meta.
findings.recommendation: Give each page genuinely unique, deeper content, or fold them back into homepage anchors and redirect the standalone routes.

findings.title: Duplicate H2 across the two villa listing pages
findings.description: VillaDetails.tsx uses the identical heading "Villa near Green School Bali – Eco & Family Living" for both Villa Sungai and Villa Kailash.
findings.recommendation: Write distinct, property-specific section headings for each villa.

findings.title: Zero E-E-A-T / authorship signals
findings.description: No author byline, credentials, license/verification info, or sameAs links exist anywhere on the site.
findings.recommendation: Add an author/agent byline with credentials and sameAs links to a real business/person entity.

findings.title: FAQ answers absent from the DOM until clicked
findings.description: Each answer is only rendered conditionally when its accordion is open; openIndex starts at null, so all 9 answers are invisible to anything that doesn't click through each item.
findings.recommendation: Render answers in the DOM by default (visually collapsed via CSS) so crawlers and AI engines can read them without interaction.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Homepage H1 directly matches search intent: "Two Eco Villas Near Green School Bali"
Villa Sungai and Villa Kailash each have their own accurate, unique H1
Sitewide footer navigation reaches every route in 1 click

findings.title: Three routes have zero <h1>
findings.description: /location, /lifestyle, and /green-school render only h2-level headings with no page-level H1 matching search intent.
findings.recommendation: Add a unique, intent-matched H1 to each of these three pages.

findings.title: 6 of 9 pages share one title/meta description
findings.description: Google Search Console will very likely report these as duplicate title/duplicate meta description across the majority of the site's URLs.
findings.recommendation: See technical.md #7 — call usePageMeta with unique content on all pages.

findings.title: No contextual internal links to the dedicated SEO landing page
findings.description: /green-school-villa-bali is only linked from the sitewide footer, with no contextual, descriptive-anchor-text links from the two commercial villa pages that would benefit most.
findings.recommendation: Add in-content links from /villa-sungai, /villa-kailash, and /location using descriptive anchor text.

findings.title: FAQ accordion missing aria-expanded/aria-controls
findings.description: Screen readers won't announce open/closed state of FAQ accordion items.
findings.recommendation: Add aria-expanded and aria-controls attributes to the accordion toggle buttons.

findings.title: Zero structured data anywhere on the site
findings.description: No Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, Product/RealEstateListing, or FAQPage JSON-LD exists anywhere, despite 9 ready-to-mark-up FAQ answers already written.
findings.recommendation: Implement in order: FAQPage on /faq, Organization+WebSite on homepage, Product/listing schema on both villa pages (omitting price per the site's no-pricing policy), BreadcrumbList sitewide. Validate each with Google's Rich Results Test.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: TTFB negligible on localhost, confirming no server-side app bottleneck
Preconnect hints present for Google Fonts

findings.title: Production JS bundle ~2.7x over this project's own 70KB gzip budget
findings.description: pnpm build output: 654.35 kB raw / 189.19 kB gzip in a single unsplit chunk, confirmed by Vite's own 'chunks larger than 500kB' warning.
findings.recommendation: Code-split by route at minimum; lazy-load below-the-fold libraries (Framer Motion, unused Radix primitives).

findings.title: Hero images unoptimized and likely miss the LCP target
findings.description: villa-sungai-hero.jpg is 554KB at 2048x1366 and is the LCP element on / and /villa-sungai, rendered via CSS background-image (undiscoverable by the preload scanner), with no preload, no fetchpriority, no responsive srcset.
findings.recommendation: Switch hero images to /, add preload+fetchpriority=high for the LCP image, compress under 100KB, add responsive srcset.

findings.title: Other large images loaded on the homepage
findings.description: organic-living.jpg (605KB) and green-school-3.jpg (397KB) load on the homepage, both far above the project's own 100KB hero-image target.
findings.recommendation: Compress and convert to WebP/AVIF; resize to actual render dimensions.

findings.title: No responsive images anywhere
findings.description: Zero srcset/sizes usage across the codebase — every image ships full source resolution to every device.
findings.recommendation: Add srcset/sizes to all content images.

findings.title: 14 of 16 homepage images missing explicit width/height
findings.description: Missing intrinsic dimensions is a primary cause of Cumulative Layout Shift.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit width/height attributes to all tags.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness (GEO)
what_works: Villa hero copy is declarative and entity-rich, the right style for AI citation once reachable

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.description: Required by this project's own CLAUDE.md; does not exist.
findings.recommendation: Add llms.txt at the site root.

findings.title: Content invisible to non-JS-executing AI crawlers
findings.description: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, and PerplexityBot commonly do not execute JavaScript. Every URL on the site currently returns an empty root div to such crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Add SSR or static prerendering.

findings.title: No crawler policy exists at all
findings.description: Combined absence of robots.txt, llms.txt, and canonical tags means no explicit signal to AI engines about which URLs are canonical or intended for citation.
findings.recommendation: Add all three; see technical.md.

findings.title: No E-E-A-T / citation-worthiness signals
findings.description: No author byline or credentials exist anywhere, reducing AI engines' willingness to cite the source.
findings.recommendation: Add an author/agent byline with credentials and sameAs links.

findings.title: Strong FAQ content is trapped, not exposed
findings.description: The FAQ page's Q&A content is close to ideal GEO material but isn't in the DOM by default and has no FAQPage schema.
findings.recommendation: Fix DOM visibility and add FAQPage schema together for compounding benefit.

categories.name: Images
what_works: 100% alt-text coverage across all 16 homepage images checked
Correct lazy-loading pattern: below-the-fold images lazy, above-the-fold hero/first-card images eager

findings.title: No modern image formats
findings.description: 28 top-level .jpg files plus ~30 more in villa-kailash/, exactly one .webp, zero AVIF. Total images folder: 26MB.
findings.recommendation: Convert to AVIF-first with WebP fallback, per this project's own image priority order.

findings.title: Oversized source files
findings.description: Multiple gallery images between 600KB-980KB (e.g. villa-kailash/10.Semi-basement-yoga2.jpg at 976K), 8-30x over the project's own 30-100KB budgets.
findings.recommendation: Compress and resize all gallery images to actual render dimensions.

findings.title: villa-kailash-hero.jpg is a mislabeled file
findings.description: The file is actually WebP content saved with a .jpg extension, confirmed via the file command.
findings.recommendation: Rename and correctly re-export as a true, appropriately-named WebP or AVIF file.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Add robots.txt allowing GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended
Add sitemap.xml listing all 9 routes
Add llms.txt at the site root
Fix FAQ accordion so answers exist in the DOM by default
Add FAQPage JSON-LD schema to /faq
Call usePageMeta on the 6 pages missing it
Add page-level H1 to /location, /lifestyle, /green-school
Resolve the /lifestyle and /green-school duplicate-content problem

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add Open Graph + Twitter Card tags sitewide
Add canonical tags to every page
De-duplicate the villa detail H2 across Villa Sungai and Villa Kailash
Add contextual internal links to /green-school-villa-bali
Add Organization + WebSite JSON-LD to homepage; Product/listing schema to villa pages
Preload and properly serve the two hero images
Add aria-expanded/aria-controls to the FAQ accordion

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Add an author/agent byline with credentials sitewide
Compress and convert the full image library to WebP/AVIF with responsive srcset
Code-split the JS bundle by route
Add explicit width/height to homepage images missing them

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Add security headers via helmet or equivalent
Remove the legacy meta keywords tag
Run Lighthouse/PageSpeed Insights against the live production domain
Re-audit after Phase 1-2 land to confirm score movement and no regressions
